name: phantom-read
description: An interactive sandbox for database isolation levels: run two transactions, pick isolation levels, and watch dirty reads, phantom reads, and write skew happen step by step.

scripts.lint: for f in src/engine/mvcc.js src/engine/scenarios.js src/engine/stepper.js src/ui/app.js src/ui/sound.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done

author: Charlie Krug
